title: Trap Cage
description: Craft a Trap item to spawn a temporary obsidian cage for PvP fights.
body:
# Create controlled PvP. **Perfect for Servers with duels, arenas, mini-games, and events.** Obsidian Cage adds a craftable Trap item that instantly spawns an obsidian cage 5x5x5 (counting will walls) around a player. ( you can change crafting recipe ) Photo from inside the cage: ![inside of the cage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f1e58a7208dca8391d2d94da6e625648a3d99a3.jpeg) The cage **automatically disappears** after a **SET TIME** ( timer set for 60 second but you can change it ) and restores the world exactly as it was with all stuff inside of chests furnaces and so on. ### ✨ Features **Craft a Trap item to spawn an obsidian cage** **FULLY restores everything that cage removed back will all stuff inside of the shulkers and chests** **Ideal for PvP encounters and duels** **Configurable cage duration** **Customizable crafting recipe** **No dependencies required** ## ⚙ Configuration **Everything can be configured via config.yml or in-game commands:** Cage duration (seconds) Enable or disable the recipe Change crafting ingredients ### 📜 Commands /trap [amount] – Get the Trap item /trap time – Set cage duration /trap recipe show – View recipe /trap recipe set – Edit recipe /trap reload – Reload configuration ### 🔑 Permissions obsidiancage.trap – Use the Trap item obsidiancage.admin – Manage settings ### ✅ Compatibility Minecraft: 1.16.5 – 1.21.x Servers: Paper, Spigot, Purpur
## Communication Have any problems?, or ideas to improve the plugin? Join the discord channel! I'm active most of the time and you can report problems, or suggest new features to improve the plugin. ### [Discord](https://discord.gg/szvJvthx) ### Support [Donate](https://ko-fi.com/drixzy)
